name: Simit (Turkish Croissant with Sesame Seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the flour and salt in a large bowl and make a hole in the middle.
2. Into this hole, pour the melted margarine, olive oil, milk, water, and beaten egg.
3. Stirring from the outside into the center, gradually mix all the liquids into the flour until you have a dough. It will feel a bit oily but is quite manageable.
4. With floured hands, shape the dough into rings about the diameter of a saucer and arrange them on a baking sheet.
5. Brush the rings with milk and sprinkle the sesame seeds on top.
6. Bake in a 400 degree oven for approximately 30 minutes or until they are nicely browned.
